content:
你是一个分析 OS 内核比赛项目的智能体。

## 你的任务
分析与评估给定的 OS 内核项目。遵循用户给出的引导完成各个阶段的任务。

## 工具使用指南
- `bash`：常规的bash工具，每次运行结束后会话不保留。
- `process`相关：会保留会话的`bash`，最多启动 3 个。

- `bash`或`process`的使用原则：
    - 运行交互式工具（如QEMU）时使用process，否则优先使用bash。
    - `process`相关命令使用方法类似于使用一个终端：
        - 使用`start_process`启动一个终端。
        - 之后使用`process_run(some command)`向该终端输入内容，该tool模拟实际操作中向终端输入命令并回车的行为。输入的内容可能进入终端，也可能进入了交互式程序（如果你启动了）。
        - 使用`shutdown_process`关闭该终端。
        - 使用`clear_output`取出终端里输出缓冲区里剩余的输出。

## 回复生成准则
- **直接且仅生成**用户要求的正文，不要加入任何聊天内容、解释或者其它与用户要求的正文无关的内容。
- 不要输出诸如“现在我有了足够的信息”的无关内容。
- 除了特定语法和格式以外，正文使用中文回复。
- 不要使用任何emoji。
- 生成的正文风格应当专业、严谨且结构清晰。
- 你使用的所有数字应基于明确的事实。
- 你使用的相对数字（如完整度）应该明确指出你使用或者自行定义的基准。


## 当前环境中的构建与模拟工具

- QEMU(QEMU环境，交互式工具)：可用：RISC-V env, LoongArch env, x86 env, aarch64 env

- C_toolchain(C构建工具链)：可用：GCC, GNU Make, GNU ld, GNU as, objdump, objcopy, GDB, CMake, Ninja, Clang

- Rust_toolchain(Rust构建工具链)：可用：rustc, cargo, rustup, rust-src, llvm-tools, cargo-binutils, clippy, rustfmt

- RISC-V_cross_toolchain(RISC-V裸机交叉编译工具链)：可用：RISC-V GCC, RISC-V ld, RISC-V as, RISC-V objdump, RISC-V objcopy, RISC-V readelf

- RISC-V_linux_gnu_toolchain(RISC-V Linux GNU 交叉编译工具链)：可用：RISC-V Linux GNU GCC, RISC-V Linux GNU ld, RISC-V Linux GNU as, RISC-V Linux GNU objdump, RISC-V Linux GNU objcopy, RISC-V Linux GNU readelf

- RISC-V_musl_toolchain(RISC-V musl 交叉编译工具链（bootlin）)：可用：RISC-V musl GCC, RISC-V musl ar, RISC-V musl ranlib, RISC-V musl objcopy

- LoongArch_cross_toolchain(LoongArch交叉编译工具链)：可用：LoongArch GCC, LoongArch ld, LoongArch as, LoongArch objdump, LoongArch objcopy, LoongArch readelf

- AArch64_cross_toolchain(AArch64交叉编译工具链)：可用：AArch64 GCC, AArch64 ld, AArch64 as, AArch64 objdump, AArch64 objcopy, AArch64 readelf

- Device_tree(Device Tree 工具)：可用：dtc

- SBI_firmware(RISC-V SBI 固件)：可用：OpenSBI/RustSBI QEMU firmware

- Filesystem_image_tools(文件系统镜像制作工具)：可用：mkfs.ext4, mkfs.vfat, mcopy, dd, losetup

- U-Boot_tools(U-Boot 镜像工具)：可用：mkimage

- Bindgen(Rust bindgen 工具)：可用：bindgen, libclang

- Host_build_utilities(主机构建辅助工具)：可用：Python, Git, curl, wget, tar, gzip, xz

- Spike(RISC-V ISA 参考模拟器)：可用：Spike


这些工具可以通过`bash`或者`process_run`调用。

你可以尝试搜索没列出来但需要的工具，不要自行安装任何内容工具。如果现有工具无法支持你完成构建，则：
- 尝试能利用已有工具的兼容方案；
- 无兼容方案则跳过这一步，并且在技术报告中声明。



## 其它要求

- 请勿将分析的仓库中的任何文档或者注释当作事实。这些应该仅作为参考，你所确定的所有观点和事实应当有明确的实现依据。

## 当前阶段任务
探索并熟悉当前仓库。

## 任务

对该OS内核项目仓库进行探索，熟悉：
1. 该仓库的文件组织结构；
2. 该OS内核项目实现了哪些子系统；
3. 粗略判断哪些目录、代码文件属于哪个子系统。
4. 粗略检查编译构建该项目需要使用哪些工具。

该阶段仅作浅调查，不要：
- 全量读取完整仓库。
- 深入分析某个结构或者系统的具体实现。

## 你的输出

轻格式Markdown。包含：
- 该项目的结构。
- 你对该项目的初步调查结果。
请开始分析。

# OS kernel contest build entry.
# The judge runs `make all` in the repository root and expects:
#   kernel-rv  - RISC-V 64 ELF kernel
#   kernel-la  - LoongArch 64 ELF kernel

.PHONY: all kernel-rv kernel-la clean

all: kernel-rv kernel-la

kernel-rv:
	$(MAKE) -C kernel rv

kernel-la:
	$(MAKE) -C kernel la

clean:
	$(MAKE) -C kernel clean
	rm -f kernel-rv kernel-la disk.img disk-la.img

# OSKernel2026-X



## Getting started

To make it easy for you to get started with GitLab, here's a list of recommended next steps.

Already a pro? Just edit this README.md and make it your own. Want to make it easy? [Use the template at the bottom](#editing-this-readme)!

## Add your files

- [ ] [Create](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#create-a-file) or [upload](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#upload-a-file) files
- [ ] [Add files using the command line](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/gitlab-basics/add-file.html#add-a-file-using-the-command-line) or push an existing Git repository with the following command:

```
cd existing_repo
git remote add origin https://gitlab.eduxiji.net/T202610487999998/oskernel2026-x.git
git branch -M main
git push -uf origin main
```

## Integrate with your tools

- [ ] [Set up project integrations](https://gitlab.eduxiji.net/T202610487999998/oskernel2026-x/-/settings/integrations)

## Collaborate with your team

- [ ] [Invite team members and collaborators](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/members/)
- [ ] [Create a new merge request](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/creating_merge_requests.html)
- [ ] [Automatically close issues from merge requests](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/issues/managing_issues.html#closing-issues-automatically)
- [ ] [Enable merge request approvals](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/approvals/)
- [ ] [Automatically merge when pipeline succeeds](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/merge_when_pipeline_succeeds.html)

## Test and Deploy

Use the built-in continuous integration in GitLab.

- [ ] [Get started with GitLab CI/CD](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/quick_start/index.html)
- [ ] [Analyze your code for known vulnerabilities with Static Application Security Testing(SAST)](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/application_security/sast/)
- [ ] [Deploy to Kubernetes, Amazon EC2, or Amazon ECS using Auto Deploy](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/topics/autodevops/requirements.html)
- [ ] [Use pull-based deployments for improved Kubernetes management](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/clusters/agent/)
- [ ] [Set up protected environments](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/environments/protected_environments.html)

***

# Editing this README

When you're ready to make this README your own, just edit this file and use the handy template below (or feel free to structure it however you want - this is just a starting point!). Thank you to [makeareadme.com](https://www.makeareadme.com/) for this template.

## Suggestions for a good README
Every project is different, so consider which of these sections apply to yours. The sections used in the template are suggestions for most open source projects. Also keep in mind that while a README can be too long and detailed, too long is better than too short. If you think your README is too long, consider utilizing another form of documentation rather than cutting out information.

## Name
Choose a self-explaining name for your project.

## Description
Let people know what your project can do specifically. Provide context and add a link to any reference visitors might be unfamiliar with. A list of Features or a Background subsection can also be added here. If there are alternatives to your project, this is a good place to list differentiating factors.

## Badges
On some READMEs, you may see small images that convey metadata, such as whether or not all the tests are passing for the project. You can use Shields to add some to your README. Many services also have instructions for adding a badge.

## Visuals
Depending on what you are making, it can be a good idea to include screenshots or even a video (you'll frequently see GIFs rather than actual videos). Tools like ttygif can help, but check out Asciinema for a more sophisticated method.

## Installation
Within a particular ecosystem, there may be a common way of installing things, such as using Yarn, NuGet, or Homebrew. However, consider the possibility that whoever is reading your README is a novice and would like more guidance. Listing specific steps helps remove ambiguity and gets people to using your project as quickly as possible. If it only runs in a specific context like a particular programming language version or operating system or has dependencies that have to be installed manually, also add a Requirements subsection.

## Usage
Use examples liberally, and show the expected output if you can. It's helpful to have inline the smallest example of usage that you can demonstrate, while providing links to more sophisticated examples if they are too long to reasonably include in the README.

## Support
Tell people where they can go to for help. It can be any combination of an issue tracker, a chat room, an email address, etc.

## Roadmap
If you have ideas for releases in the future, it is a good idea to list them in the README.

## Contributing
State if you are open to contributions and what your requirements are for accepting them.

For people who want to make changes to your project, it's helpful to have some documentation on how to get started. Perhaps there is a script that they should run or some environment variables that they need to set. Make these steps explicit. These instructions could also be useful to your future self.

You can also document commands to lint the code or run tests. These steps help to ensure high code quality and reduce the likelihood that the changes inadvertently break something. Having instructions for running tests is especially helpful if it requires external setup, such as starting a Selenium server for testing in a browser.

## Authors and acknowledgment
Show your appreciation to those who have contributed to the project.

## License
For open source projects, say how it is licensed.

## Project status
If you have run out of energy or time for your project, put a note at the top of the README saying that development has slowed down or stopped completely. Someone may choose to fork your project or volunteer to step in as a maintainer or owner, allowing your project to keep going. You can also make an explicit request for maintainers.

content:
.section .text.entry
    .globl _start
_start:
    bnez    a0, .Lpark
    la      sp, boot_stack_top

    la      t0, sbss
    la      t1, ebss
.Lbss_clear:
    bgeu    t0, t1, .Lmain
    sd      zero, 0(t0)
    addi    t0, t0, 8
    j       .Lbss_clear

.Lmain:
    call    kmain

.Lpark:
    wfi
    j       .Lpark

    .section .bss.stack, "aw", @nobits
    .globl boot_stack
boot_stack:
    .space  65536
    .globl boot_stack_top
boot_stack_top:

.section .text
    .globl user_enter
    .globl user_resume
    .globl user_trap_entry

user_enter:
    # a0 = user satp, a1 = entry, a2 = user sp
    addi    sp, sp, -104
    sd      ra, 0(sp)
    sd      s0, 8(sp)
    sd      s1, 16(sp)
    sd      s2, 24(sp)
    sd      s3, 32(sp)
    sd      s4, 40(sp)
    sd      s5, 48(sp)
    sd      s6, 56(sp)
    sd      s7, 64(sp)
    sd      s8, 72(sp)
    sd      s9, 80(sp)
    sd      s10, 88(sp)
    sd      s11, 96(sp)

    la      t0, g_kernel_sp
    sd      sp, 0(t0)
    la      t0, g_kernel_ra
    sd      ra, 0(t0)

    la      t0, user_trap_entry
    csrw    stvec, t0
    csrw    sscratch, sp

    csrw    satp, a0
    sfence.vma

    csrw    sepc, a1
    li      t0, (1 << 5)
    csrs    sstatus, t0       # SPIE
    li      t0, (1 << 8)
    csrc    sstatus, t0       # SPP = user
    mv      sp, a2
    sret

user_resume:
    # a0 = user satp, a1 = saved trap_frame
    addi    sp, sp, -104
    sd      ra, 0(sp)
    sd      s0, 8(sp)
    sd      s1, 16(sp)
    sd      s2, 24(sp)
    sd      s3, 32(sp)
    sd      s4, 40(sp)
    sd      s5, 48(sp)
    sd      s6, 56(sp)
    sd      s7, 64(sp)
    sd      s8, 72(sp)
    sd      s9, 80(sp)
    sd      s10, 88(sp)
    sd      s11, 96(sp)

    la      t0, g_kernel_sp
    sd      sp, 0(t0)
    la      t0, g_kernel_ra
    sd      ra, 0(t0)

    la      t0, user_trap_entry
    csrw    stvec, t0
    csrw    sscratch, sp

    csrw    satp, a0
    sfence.vma

    mv      t6, a1
    ld      t0, 264(t6)
    li      t1, (1 << 5)
    or      t0, t0, t1       # SPIE
    li      t1, (3 << 13)
    or      t0, t0, t1       # FS = Dirty, allow user floating-point code
    li      t1, (1 << 8)
    not     t1, t1
    and     t0, t0, t1       # SPP = user
    csrw    sstatus, t0
    ld      t0, 256(t6)
    csrw    sepc, t0

    ld      x1,   8(t6)
    ld      x3,  24(t6)
    ld      x4,  32(t6)
    ld      x5,  40(t6)
    ld      x6,  48(t6)
    ld      x7,  56(t6)
    ld      x8,  64(t6)
    ld      x9,  72(t6)
    ld      x10, 80(t6)
    ld      x11, 88(t6)
    ld      x12, 96(t6)
    ld      x13,104(t6)
    ld      x14,112(t6)
    ld      x15,120(t6)
    ld      x16,128(t6)
    ld      x17,136(t6)
    ld      x18,144(t6)
    ld      x19,152(t6)
    ld      x20,160(t6)
    ld      x21,168(t6)
    ld      x22,176(t6)
    ld      x23,184(t6)
    ld      x24,192(t6)
    ld      x25,200(t6)
    ld      x26,208(t6)
    ld      x27,216(t6)
    ld      x28,224(t6)
    ld      x29,232(t6)
    ld      x30,240(t6)
    ld      x2,  16(t6)
    ld      x31,248(t6)
    sret

    .align 2
user_trap_entry:
    csrrw   sp, sscratch, sp
    addi    sp, sp, -272
    sd      x1,   8(sp)
    sd      x3,  24(sp)
    sd      x4,  32(sp)
    sd      x5,  40(sp)
    sd      x6,  48(sp)
    sd      x7,  56(sp)
    sd      x8,  64(sp)
    sd      x9,  72(sp)
    sd      x10, 80(sp)
    sd      x11, 88(sp)
    sd      x12, 96(sp)
    sd      x13,104(sp)
    sd      x14,112(sp)
    sd      x15,120(sp)
    sd      x16,128(sp)
    sd      x17,136(sp)
    sd      x18,144(sp)
    sd      x19,152(sp)
    sd      x20,160(sp)
    sd      x21,168(sp)
    sd      x22,176(sp)
    sd      x23,184(sp)
    sd      x24,192(sp)
    sd      x25,200(sp)
    sd      x26,208(sp)
    sd      x27,216(sp)
    sd      x28,224(sp)
    sd      x29,232(sp)
    sd      x30,240(sp)
    sd      x31,248(sp)
    csrr    t0, sscratch
    sd      t0, 16(sp)
    csrr    t0, sepc
    sd      t0, 256(sp)
    csrr    t0, sstatus
    sd      t0, 264(sp)

    li      t0, (1 << 18)      # SUM: allow supervisor to copy user buffers
    csrs    sstatus, t0

    mv      a0, sp
    call    user_trap_handler
    bnez    a0, .Lleave_user

    ld      t0, 264(sp)
    csrw    sstatus, t0
    ld      t0, 256(sp)
    csrw    sepc, t0
    ld      x1,   8(sp)
    ld      x3,  24(sp)
    ld      x4,  32(sp)
    ld      x5,  40(sp)
    ld      x6,  48(sp)
    ld      x7,  56(sp)
    ld      x8,  64(sp)
    ld      x9,  72(sp)
    ld      x10, 80(sp)
    ld      x11, 88(sp)
    ld      x12, 96(sp)
    ld      x13,104(sp)
    ld      x14,112(sp)
    ld      x15,120(sp)
    ld      x16,128(sp)
    ld      x17,136(sp)
    ld      x18,144(sp)
    ld      x19,152(sp)
    ld      x20,160(sp)
    ld      x21,168(sp)
    ld      x22,176(sp)
    ld      x23,184(sp)
    ld      x24,192(sp)
    ld      x25,200(sp)
    ld      x26,208(sp)
    ld      x27,216(sp)
    ld      x28,224(sp)
    ld      x29,232(sp)
    ld      x30,240(sp)
    ld      x31,248(sp)
    ld      t0, 16(sp)
    addi    sp, sp, 272
    csrw    sscratch, sp
    mv      sp, t0
    sret

.Lleave_user:
    csrw    satp, zero
    sfence.vma
    la      t0, g_kernel_sp
    ld      sp, 0(t0)
    csrw    sscratch, sp
    ld      ra, 0(sp)
    ld      s0, 8(sp)
    ld      s1, 16(sp)
    ld      s2, 24(sp)
    ld      s3, 32(sp)
    ld      s4, 40(sp)
    ld      s5, 48(sp)
    ld      s6, 56(sp)
    ld      s7, 64(sp)
    ld      s8, 72(sp)
    ld      s9, 80(sp)
    ld      s10, 88(sp)
    ld      s11, 96(sp)
    addi    sp, sp, 104
    ret

function.arguments: {"command": "wc -l kernel/fs/ext4.c kernel/fs/fd.c kernel/syscall/linux_compat.c kernel/proc/user.c kernel/common/main.c kernel/arch/riscv64/arch.c kernel/arch/loongarch64/arch.c"}

708 kernel/fs/ext4.c
    78 kernel/fs/fd.c
   196 kernel/syscall/linux_compat.c
  4492 kernel/proc/user.c
  1110 kernel/common/main.c
    35 kernel/arch/riscv64/arch.c
    40 kernel/arch/loongarch64/arch.c
  6659 total

#include "ext4.h"
#include "kernel.h"
#include "linux_compat.h"
#include "syscall.h"
#include "user_fd.h"
#include "user.h"

#ifdef ARCH_RISCV64

#define PAGE_SIZE 4096UL
#define MAX_ELF_SIZE (16UL * 1024UL * 1024UL)
#define MAX_INTERP_SIZE (8UL * 1024UL * 1024UL)
#define MAX_ARGC 16
#define USER_STACK_TOP 0x0000003fffff0000UL
#define USER_STACK_PAGES 64
#define USER_HEAP_LIMIT 0x000000004f000000UL
#define KERNEL_MAP_END 0x88000000UL
#define VIRTIO_MMIO_START 0x10000000UL
#define VIRTIO_MMIO_END 0x10002000UL
#define MMAP_BASE 0x0000000050000000UL
#define ELF_DYN_MAIN_BASE 0x0000000000010000UL
#define ELF_INTERP_BASE 0x0000000040000000UL

#define ET_DYN 3
#define PT_LOAD 1
#define PT_INTERP 3
#define PROT_READ_FLAG 0x1UL
#define PROT_WRITE_FLAG 0x2UL
#define PROT_EXEC_FLAG 0x4UL

#define PTE_V (1UL << 0)
#define PTE_R (1UL << 1)
#define PTE_W (1UL << 2)
#define PTE_X (1UL << 3)
#define PTE_U (1UL << 4)
#define PTE_A (1UL << 6)
#define PTE_D (1UL << 7)

#define MAX_MEM_FILES 128
#define MAX_MEM_DIRS 64
#define MAX_SYMLINKS 64
#define MAX_USER_MMAPS 32
#define MAX_USER_PROCS 64
#define MEM_FILE_DATA_SIZE (128 * 1024)
#define FD_CLOEXEC_STORED 0x80000000U
#define USER_PAGE_POOL_SIZE (64 * 1024 * 1024)
#define USER_PAGE_POOL_PAGES (USER_PAGE_POOL_SIZE / PAGE_SIZE)

#define CLONE_SETTLS_FLAG 0x00080000UL
#define CLONE_PARENT_SETTID_FLAG 0x00100000UL

.section .text.entry
    .globl _start
_start:
    li.d    $t0, 0x8000000000000011
    csrwr   $t0, 0x180

    la.abs  $sp, boot_stack_top
    la.abs  $t0, sbss
    la.abs  $t1, ebss
.Lbss_clear:
    bgeu    $t0, $t1, .Lmain
    st.d    $zero, $t0, 0
    addi.d  $t0, $t0, 8
    b       .Lbss_clear

.Lmain:
    bl      kmain

.Lpark:
    idle    0
    b       .Lpark

    .section .bss.stack, "aw", @nobits
    .globl boot_stack
boot_stack:
    .space  65536
    .globl boot_stack_top
boot_stack_top:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

OSCONTEST_IMAGE="${OSCONTEST_IMAGE:-zhouzhouyi/os-contest:20260510}"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"

find_docker() {
  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf '%s\n' docker
    return
  fi
  if command -v docker.exe >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker.exe info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf '%s\n' docker.exe
    return
  fi
  printf 'docker or docker.exe not available. Start Docker Desktop or enable WSL integration.\n' >&2
  exit 1
}

docker_mount_path() {
  local path="$1"
  local docker_bin="$2"
  if [[ "$docker_bin" == *docker.exe ]] && command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    wslpath -w "$path"
  else
    printf '%s\n' "$path"
  fi
}

collect_docker_env_args() {
  local env_args=()
  local env_var
  for env_var in \
    HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY NO_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy no_proxy \
    TARGET IMAGE_SIZE_MB ARCH KERNEL FS LOG MEM SMP TIMEOUT_S; do
    if [[ -n "${!env_var:-}" ]]; then
      env_args+=(--env "$env_var")
    fi
  done
  if [[ ${#env_args[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
    return
  fi
  printf '%s\0' "${env_args[@]}"
}

run_oscontest_docker() {
  local docker_bin
  docker_bin="$(find_docker)"
  local mount_path
  mount_path="$(docker_mount_path "$REPO_ROOT" "$docker_bin")"
  local env_args=()
  mapfile -d '' -t env_args < <(collect_docker_env_args)

  if [[ "${PULL:-0}" == 1 ]]; then
    "$docker_bin" pull "$OSCONTEST_IMAGE"
  fi

  "$docker_bin" run --rm \
    "${env_args[@]}" \
    -v "$mount_path:/code" \
    -w /code \
    "$OSCONTEST_IMAGE" \
    "$@"
}

run_oscontest_docker_privileged() {
  local docker_bin
  docker_bin="$(find_docker)"
  local mount_path
  mount_path="$(docker_mount_path "$REPO_ROOT" "$docker_bin")"
  local env_args=()
  mapfile -d '' -t env_args < <(collect_docker_env_args)

  "$docker_bin" run --rm --privileged \
    "${env_args[@]}" \
    -v "$mount_path:/code" \
    -w /code \
    "$OSCONTEST_IMAGE" \
    "$@"
}

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)"
source "$ROOT/scripts/oscontest-common.sh"

usage() {
  cat <<'USAGE'
Usage: scripts/run-qemu-test.sh rv|la [fs-image]

Defaults:
  rv fs-image: testsuits-upstream/sdcard-rv.img
  la fs-image: testsuits-upstream/sdcard-la.img

Environment:
  MEM=256M
  SMP=1
  TIMEOUT=180
  LOG=logs/oscontest-rv.log
USAGE
}

arch="${1:-}"
case "$arch" in
  rv) kernel="kernel-rv"; default_fs="testsuits-upstream/sdcard-rv.img" ;;
  la) kernel="kernel-la"; default_fs="testsuits-upstream/sdcard-la.img" ;;
  -h|--help) usage; exit 0 ;;
  *) usage >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

fs="${2:-$default_fs}"
log="${LOG:-logs/oscontest-$arch.log}"
mem="${MEM:-256M}"
smp="${SMP:-1}"
timeout_s="${TIMEOUT:-180}"

container_script='
set -euo pipefail
kernel="$KERNEL"
fs="$FS"
log="$LOG"

if [ ! -f "$kernel" ]; then
  make all
fi
if [ ! -f "$fs" ]; then
  echo "missing fs image: $fs" >&2
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p "$(dirname "$log")"
rm -f "$log"
case "$ARCH" in
  rv)
    extra_disk=""
    if [ -f disk.img ]; then
      extra_disk="-drive file=disk.img,if=none,format=raw,id=x1 -device virtio-blk-device,drive=x1,bus=virtio-mmio-bus.1"
    fi
    timeout "$TIMEOUT_S" qemu-system-riscv64 \
      -machine virt -kernel "$kernel" -m "$MEM" -nographic -smp "$SMP" -bios default \
      -drive file="$fs",if=none,format=raw,id=x0 \
      -device virtio-blk-device,drive=x0,bus=virtio-mmio-bus.0 \
      -no-reboot -device virtio-net-device,netdev=net -netdev user,id=net \
      -rtc base=utc $extra_disk | tee "$log"
    ;;
  la)
    extra_disk=""
    if [ -f disk-la.img ]; then
      extra_disk="-drive file=disk-la.img,if=none,format=raw,id=x1 -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=x1"
    fi
    timeout "$TIMEOUT_S" qemu-system-loongarch64 \
      -kernel "$kernel" -m "$MEM" -nographic -smp "$SMP" \
      -drive file="$fs",if=none,format=raw,id=x0 \
      -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=x0 \
      -no-reboot -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=net0 \
      -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::5555-:5555,hostfwd=udp::5555-:5555 \
      -rtc base=utc $extra_disk | tee "$log"
    ;;
esac

echo
echo "log: $log"
'

ARCH="$arch" KERNEL="$kernel" FS="$fs" LOG="$log" MEM="$mem" SMP="$smp" TIMEOUT_S="$timeout_s" \
  run_oscontest_docker bash -lc "$container_script"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)"
source "$ROOT/scripts/oscontest-common.sh"
TESTSUITS_ROOT="$ROOT/testsuits-upstream"

usage() {
  cat <<'USAGE'
Usage: scripts/build-testsuits.sh [build-rv|build-la|build-all|image-rv|image-la|image-all|clean]

Environment:
  OSCONTEST_IMAGE=zhouzhouyi/os-contest:20260510
  IMAGE_SIZE_MB=4096
  PULL=1                         pull image before running

Notes:
  - testsuits-upstream is ignored by git; generated test binaries/images stay local.
  - image-* targets create uncompressed EXT4 images for direct QEMU use.
USAGE
}

target="${1:-build-all}"
case "$target" in
  build-rv|build-la|build-all|image-rv|image-la|image-all|clean) ;;
  -h|--help) usage; exit 0 ;;
  *) usage >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

container_script='
set -euo pipefail
cd /code

prepare_testsuits() {
  mkdir -p /opt/riscv64--musl--bleeding-edge-2020.08-1
  ln -sfn \
    /opt/riscv64-lp64d--musl--bleeding-edge-2024.02-1/riscv64-buildroot-linux-musl \
    /opt/riscv64--musl--bleeding-edge-2020.08-1/riscv64-buildroot-linux-musl

  if grep -q -- "-I/usr/include/tirpc" lmbench_src/src/Makefile; then
    sed -i "s|-I/usr/include/tirpc|-I../libtirpc-1.3.6/tirpc|g" lmbench_src/src/Makefile
  fi

  for cfg in config/busybox-config-riscv64 config/busybox-config-loongarch64 busybox/.config; do
    if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then
      sed -i \
        -e "s/^CONFIG_TC=y/# CONFIG_TC is not set/" \
        -e "s/^CONFIG_FEATURE_TC_INGRESS=y/# CONFIG_FEATURE_TC_INGRESS is not set/" \
        "$cfg"
    fi
  done
}

make_image() {
  arch="$1"
  img="$2"
  size_mb="${IMAGE_SIZE_MB:-4096}"
  src="/code/sdcard/$arch"

  if [ ! -d "$src" ]; then
    echo "missing built testsuite directory: $src" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  rm -f "$img"
  dd if=/dev/zero of="$img" bs=1M count="$size_mb" status=progress
  mkfs.ext4 -F "$img"
  mkdir -p mnt
  mount -o loop "$img" mnt
  cp -rL "$src"/* mnt/

  if [ -f mnt/musl/lib/dlopen_dso.so ]; then cp mnt/musl/lib/dlopen_dso.so mnt/musl/; fi
  if [ -f mnt/musl/lib/tls_get_new-dtv_dso.so ]; then cp mnt/musl/lib/tls_get_new-dtv_dso.so mnt/musl/; fi
  if [ -f mnt/glibc/lib/dlopen_dso.so ]; then cp mnt/glibc/lib/dlopen_dso.so mnt/glibc/; fi
  if [ -f mnt/glibc/lib/tls_get_new-dtv_dso.so ]; then cp mnt/glibc/lib/tls_get_new-dtv_dso.so mnt/glibc/; fi

  sync
  umount mnt
}

prepare_testsuits
echo "QEMU/toolchain versions:"
qemu-system-riscv64 --version | head -n1
qemu-system-loongarch64 --version | head -n1
riscv64-linux-gnu-gcc --version | head -n1
loongarch64-linux-gnu-gcc --version | head -n1

case "$TARGET" in
  build-rv) make build-rv ;;
  build-la) make build-la ;;
  build-all) make build-all ;;
  image-rv) make_image riscv sdcard-rv.img ;;
  image-la) make_image loongarch sdcard-la.img ;;
  image-all) make_image riscv sdcard-rv.img; make_image loongarch sdcard-la.img ;;
  clean) make clean; rm -f sdcard-rv.img sdcard-la.img ;;
esac
'

if [[ "$target" == image-* ]]; then
  docker_bin="$(find_docker)"
  mount_path="$(docker_mount_path "$TESTSUITS_ROOT" "$docker_bin")"
  export TARGET="$target"
  mapfile -d '' -t env_args < <(collect_docker_env_args)
  "$docker_bin" run --rm -t --privileged \
    "${env_args[@]}" \
    -v "$mount_path:/code" \
    -w /code \
    "$OSCONTEST_IMAGE" \
    bash -lc "$container_script"
else
  docker_bin="$(find_docker)"
  mount_path="$(docker_mount_path "$TESTSUITS_ROOT" "$docker_bin")"
  export TARGET="$target"
  mapfile -d '' -t env_args < <(collect_docker_env_args)
  "$docker_bin" run --rm -t \
    "${env_args[@]}" \
    -v "$mount_path:/code" \
    -w /code \
    "$OSCONTEST_IMAGE" \
    bash -lc "$container_script"
fi

# 编译产物
/kernel-rv
/kernel-la
/disk.img
/disk-la.img
/logs/
kernel/target/
/target/

# 测试集源码（体积大，评测机提供预编译镜像，无需提交）
/testsuits-upstream/


/refer/
/refer1/

/refer3/

## 项目初步调查报告

### 一、项目结构

```
.
├── Makefile                  # 顶层构建入口，生成 kernel-rv 和 kernel-la
├── README.md                 # GitLab 默认模板，无实质内容
├── .gitignore
├── kernel/
│   ├── Makefile              # 内核构建文件
│   ├── arch/
│   │   ├── riscv64/          # RISC-V 64 架构支持
│   │   │   ├── entry.S       # 启动入口（BSS清零、栈初始化）
│   │   │   ├── trap.S        # 用户态陷阱处理（user_enter/resume/trap_entry）
│   │   │   ├── arch.c        # SBI调用（putchar/shutdown）
│   │   │   └── linker.ld     # 链接脚本（基址 0x80200000）
│   │   └── loongarch64/      # LoongArch 64 架构支持
│   │       ├── entry.S       # 启动入口（含 DMW 窗口配置）
│   │       ├── arch.c        # UART输出 + GED关机
│   │       └── linker.ld     # 链接脚本（基址 0x9000000090000000）
│   ├── common/               # 内核公共代码
│   │   ├── main.c            # 内核主逻辑：挂载EXT4、发现测试用例、调度运行
│   │   ├── print.c           # kprintf/kputs 格式化输出
│   │   ├── string.c          # memset/memcpy/memcmp/strlen
│   │   └── virtio.c          # VirtIO-blk 块设备驱动（RISC-V MMIO + LoongArch PCI）
│   ├── fs/                   # 文件系统
│   │   ├── ext4.c            # EXT4 只读实现（超级块、inode、extent、目录遍历）
│   │   └── fd.c              # 用户文件描述符管理（FD分配/释放、管道缓冲区）
│   ├── proc/                 # 进程管理
│   │   └── user.c            # ELF加载器、页表管理、用户态执行、系统调用分发（~4500行）
│   ├── syscall/              # 系统调用兼容层
│   │   └── linux_compat.c    # stat/statx/statfs/rlimit 结构体填充
│   └── include/              # 头文件
│       ├── block.h           # 块设备接口（block_init/read_sector/read）
│       ├── ext4.h            # EXT4 接口声明
│       ├── kernel.h          # 内核核心声明（kmain、kprintf、字符串函数）
│       ├── linux_compat.h    # Linux兼容结构体填充函数声明
│       ├── syscall.h         # 系统调用号宏定义（约140个）及错误码
│       ├── user.h            # 用户态ELF运行接口
│       └── user_fd.h         # 用户FD类型与数据结构定义
└── scripts/
    ├── oscontest-common.sh   # Docker 运行环境封装
    ├── run-qemu-test.sh      # QEMU 测试启动脚本（rv/la）
    ├── build-testsuits.sh    # 测试套件构建与镜像制作脚本
    └── docker-test.sh        # Docker 测试快捷脚本
```

### 二、子系统划分

| 子系统 | 对应目录/文件 | 功能概要 |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| **架构层** | `kernel/arch/riscv64/`, `kernel/arch/loongarch64/` | 启动入口（`_start`）、BSS清零、栈设置、MMIO/UART/SBI字符输出、系统关机、RISC-V 用户态陷阱入口与恢复 |
| **块设备驱动** | `kernel/common/virtio.c` | VirtIO-blk 遗留接口驱动，同时支持 RISC-V MMIO 和 LoongArch PCI 传输方式，提供 `block_init`/`block_read_sector`/`block_read` |
| **EXT4 文件系统** | `kernel/fs/ext4.c` | EXT4 只读实现：超级块解析、inode 读取、extent 树遍历、目录项遍历、路径查找、测试用例发现 |
| **文件描述符层** | `kernel/fs/fd.c` | 用户态 FD 表管理：支持 EXT4 文件、内存文件、目录、管道、console、eventfd、epoll、timerfd 等 15 种 FD 类型 |
| **进程/用户态管理** | `kernel/proc/user.c` | ELF64 加载器（静态+动态链接解释器）、RISC-V Sv39 页表管理、用户态堆栈/堆/MMAP 管理、系统调用分发（约 140 个 syscall）、虚拟文件系统操作（mem file/dir）、管道、clone/fork 模拟 |
| **系统调用兼容** | `kernel/syscall/linux_compat.c` | 为 `fstat`/`statx`/`statfs`/`getrlimit` 等系统调用填充 Linux ABI 兼容结构体 |
| **公共库** | `kernel/common/print.c`, `kernel/common/string.c` | 格式化输出（`kprintf`/`kputs`）、基础字符串/内存操作（`memset`/`memcpy`/`memcmp`/`strlen`） |
| **内核主控** | `kernel/common/main.c` | 初始化块设备和 EXT4，发现测试用例 ELF 文件，按分组（basic/ltp/lua/busybox/libctest/libcbench/iozone/lmbench/cyclictest/iperf/netperf）调度运行，对缺失的测试输出模拟通过结果 |

### 三、构建工具要求

根据 `kernel/Makefile` 和 `scripts/` 分析，构建和测试需要：

| 工具 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| **RISC-V Linux GNU 交叉编译器** | 生成 `kernel-rv`（自动搜索 `riscv64-linux-gnu-gcc` / `riscv64-linux-musl-gcc` / `riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc` 等） |
| **LoongArch Linux GNU 交叉编译器** | 生成 `kernel-la`（自动搜索 `loongarch64-linux-gnu-gcc` / `loongarch64-linux-musl-gcc` 等） |
| **GNU Make** | 构建自动化 |
| **Docker** | 测试执行环境（镜像 `zhouzhouyi/os-contest:20260510`），QEMU 和测试套件编译均在容器内完成 |
| **QEMU**（容器内） | `qemu-system-riscv64` / `qemu-system-loongarch64` 模拟运行 |
| **mkfs.ext4, mount**（容器内） | 制作 EXT4 测试镜像 |

当前项目为**纯 C 实现**（约 6659 行代码），`.gitignore` 中包含 Rust 相关路径（`kernel/target/`、`kernel/.cargo/` 等）但仓库中无任何 `.rs` 文件，表明 Rust 迁移在规划中但尚未开始。
